BIAN_PARTY.instructions:
PARTY_ID → Generate UUID; must be unique.
FULL_NAME → Faker full name.
DATE_OF_BIRTH → Random date between 1970-01-01 and 1990-12-31.
GENDER → Choose from ['MALE','FEMALE','OTHER'] with ~70/29/1 distribution.
NATIONALITY → Choose from ['US','IN','AE','UK','CA'] with ~50/20/10/10/10.
SSN → Faker SSN-like string; ensure uniqueness per COUNTRY rules if needed.
EMAIL → Faker email; prefer globally unique values.
PHONE_NUMBER → Faker phone number (E.164 if you need consistency).
ADDRESS_LINE1 → Faker street address.
ADDRESS_LINE2 → Faker secondary address or empty ~40% of time.
CITY → Faker city.
STATE → Faker state/region.
POSTAL_CODE → Faker postal code.
COUNTRY → Mirror NATIONALITY distribution ['US','IN','AE','UK','CA'] ~50/20/10/10/10.
CREATED_AT → Random timestamp within last 10 years.

BIAN_ACCOUNTS.instructions:
ACCOUNT_ID → Generate UUID; unique.
PARTY_ID → Randomly pick from existing BIAN_PARTY(PARTY_ID).
ACCOUNT_TYPE → 60% "Checking", 30% "Savings", 10% "Credit Card".
ACCOUNT_STATUS → 70% "Active", 20% "Dormant", 10% "Closed".
OPEN_DATE → Random date within last 15 years.
BALANCE → If ACCOUNT_TYPE="Credit Card": 20% negative (−5000 to −100), else positive (100 to 100000).
CURRENCY → Choose from ["USD","EUR","GBP","INR","AED"] weighted by PARTY.COUNTRY if available.
INTEREST_RATE → 0.1%–5% for Checking/Savings, 10%–25% for Credit Card.
BRANCH_ID → "BR" + 3–4 digit code (e.g., BR001–BR050).
CREATED_AT → Random timestamp on or after OPEN_DATE (spread up to ~10 years)

BIAN_TRANSACTION.instructions:
TRANSACTION_ID → Generate UUID; unique.
ACCOUNT_ID → Randomly pick from existing BIAN_ACCOUNTS(ACCOUNT_ID).
TRANSACTION_TYPE → Choose from ["DEPOSIT","WITHDRAWAL","PAYMENT","TRANSFER","FEE","REFUND"] with realistic skew (e.g., DEPOSIT/WITHDRAWAL heavy).
AMOUNT → > 0; typical range 1–5000 (tail up to 20000 for high-value).
CURRENCY → Inherit from the linked account’s CURRENCY when possible; else pick from ["USD","EUR","GBP","INR","AED"].
TRANSACTION_TIMESTAMP → Faker datetime between 2010-01-01 and now.
MERCHANT_NAME → Faker company (blank for non-merchant types like TRANSFER/FEE).
MERCHANT_CATEGORY → Pick from ["GROCERY","RESTAURANT","FUEL","ONLINE","TRAVEL","UTILITY","OTHER"]; empty for TRANSFER/FEE.
LOCATION → City + Country for merchanted transactions; else empty.
CHANNEL → Choose from ["POS","ONLINE","MOBILE","ATM","BRANCH"].
STATUS → 92% "POSTED", 6% "PENDING", 2% "REVERSED".
CREATED_AT → Timestamp on or after TRANSACTION_TIMESTAMP (within +0–3 days).
Behavioral rules → ~80% non-fraud normal mix; ~10% “structuring” sequences: per selected ACCOUNT_ID, emit 3–5 DEPOSITs of 1000–9999 within 1–3 days; ~10% high-velocity bursts: 2–4 small PAYMENTS/WITHDRAWALS within 30–120 minutes.

BIAN_KYC_PROFILE.instructions:
KYC_ID → UUID; unique.
PARTY_ID → Random from BIAN_PARTY(PARTY_ID).
KYC_STATUS → 70% "Verified", 20% "Pending", 10% "Rejected".
REVIEW_DATE → Random date within last 3 years (bias to last 90 days if "Pending").
RISK_LEVEL → 25% "High", 50% "Medium", 25% "Low" (increase "High" odds when KYC_STATUS="Rejected").
REVIEWER_ID → From pool EMP1001–EMP1020.
LAST_UPDATED → Timestamp on or after REVIEW_DATE (very recent if "Pending").

BIAN_DOCUMENT.instructions:
DOC_ID → UUID; unique.
PARTY_ID → Random from BIAN_PARTY(PARTY_ID).
DOC_TYPE → 50% "Passport", 30% "Driver License", 20% "National ID".
DOC_NUMBER → Pattern by DOC_TYPE (e.g., Passport: 2 letters + 7 digits; Driver License: alnum 8–12; National ID: digits 10–12).
ISSUE_DATE → Random date within last 15 years.
EXPIRY_DATE → After ISSUE_DATE: 5–10 years for Passport/Driver License, ~10 years for National ID.
ISSUING_AUTHORITY → From ["Passport Office","DMV","National ID Authority"] by DOC_TYPE.
DOC_STATUS → 85% "Active", 15% "Expired" (force "Expired" if EXPIRY_DATE < today).
UPLOADED_AT → Timestamp within ±7 days of ISSUE_DATE.

BIAN_RISK_ASSESSMENT.instructions:
RISK_ID → UUID; unique.
PARTY_ID → Random from BIAN_PARTY(PARTY_ID).
RISK_MODEL_NAME → Choose from ["MODEL_A","MODEL_B","MODEL_C"].
RISK_SCORE → Float 0–100 with 20% > 80 (high-risk).
RISK_CATEGORY → Derive: "High" if >80, "Medium" if 40–80, "Low" if <40.
REVIEWED_BY → EMP2001–EMP2020.
REVIEW_DATE → Date within last 2 years.
RECOMMENDATION → From ["Enhanced Due Diligence","Monitor","Proceed"] based on RISK_CATEGORY.
CREATED_AT → Timestamp on or after REVIEW_DATE.

BIAN_DEVICE_ACCESS.instructions:
DEVICE_ID → UUID; unique.
PARTY_ID → Random from BIAN_PARTY(PARTY_ID).
DEVICE_TYPE → 60% "Mobile", 30% "Desktop", 10% "Tablet".
DEVICE_OS → By DEVICE_TYPE: Mobile → ["iOS","Android"]; Desktop → ["Windows","macOS","Linux"]; Tablet → ["iPadOS","Android"].
IP_ADDRESS → Valid IPv4 or IPv6.
LOCATION → City + Country.
LOGIN_TIME → Timestamp within last 6 months.
LOGOUT_TIME → After LOGIN_TIME (0.1–8 hours later); 5% sessions may omit LOGOUT_TIME to simulate active sessions.
AUTH_METHOD → 15% "Biometric", 50% "Password", 35% "Two-Factor".
SESSION_STATUS → "Active" if no LOGOUT_TIME else "Closed".

BIAN_FRAUD_ALERT.instructions:
ALERT_ID → UUID; unique.
TRANSACTION_ID → Random from BIAN_TRANSACTION(TRANSACTION_ID).
PARTY_ID → Random from BIAN_PARTY(PARTY_ID) (ideally matching the party behind the linked account).
ALERT_TYPE → Choose from ["Unusual Location","Multiple Failed Logins","High-Value Transaction","Suspicious IP"].
TRIGGERED_AT → Timestamp within last 1 year.
RESOLUTION_STATUS → 60% "Open", 30% "Resolved", 10% "Escalated".
RESOLVED_BY → If RESOLUTION_STATUS in ("Resolved","Escalated"): EMP3001–EMP3050 else NULL.
